name: Unreturned Badge Report
query:
SELECT
  c.name as "Badge:Link/Visitors Registration Card:120",
  c.current_visitor as "Visitor:Link/Visitor:120",
  v.full_name as "Full Name::150",
  v.host_employee as "Host Employee:Link/Employee:150",
  l.time_in as "Checked In:Datetime:160",
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, l.time_in, NOW()) as "Hours On Site:Int:120"
FROM `tabVisitors Registration Card` c
LEFT JOIN `tabVisitor` v ON v.name = c.current_visitor
LEFT JOIN `tabVisitors Registration Log` l
  ON l.qr_code = c.name AND l.log_type = 'IN' AND l.time_out IS NULL
WHERE c.status = 'Assigned'
ORDER BY l.time_in ASC
